name: agency-os
description: | Notion-as-source-of-truth dispatch board for running your work like an AI agency. One Tasks database is the source of truth; tasks flow Suggestion through Discussion, To-Do, In Progress, and Done with subtasks, recurring cadences, dependencies, and template subtrees. Batch execution fans approved To-Do rows out to parallel agents with per-task model selection. Use when capturing chat to Notion, running the To-Do queue, suggesting, approving, or discussing tasks, or coordinating multi-task batc
author: jeremylongshore
summary_zh: 把 Notion 当作任务调度中心，用类似 AI 公司的方式管理工作：所有任务集中在一个数据库里，按建议、讨论、待办、进行中、已完成流转，支持子任务、循环、依赖和模板，还能把已批准的待办批量分派给多个智能体并行执行，每个任务可单独选模型。
